conflict: Miami Dade Honors and a later transfer path feel both practical and like defeat, while the family moves into a smaller airport-area apartment with Delroy only partly restored to the household.
consequence: Tiana chooses the local start, Marcia takes a hospital transport job, Delroy begins overnight maintenance work, and the family enters a future still precarious but no longer built on lies they refuse to name.
must_land_beats: The local-college decision feels chosen under constraint, not framed as easy uplift.
Kerene exits toward her own future instead of disappearing as scaffolding.
Micah returns chastened but still funny.
The ending remains unsentimental and open rather than triumphant.
objective: Step back into motion without pretending the loss never happened.
